title: Create: Cooking
description: Indulge your virtual taste buds with Create: Cooking
body:
Indulge your virtual taste buds with **Create: Cooking**, the ultimate food-centric mod for Minecraft! Immerse yourself in a world of gastronomic delights as you explore new culinary possibilities, harvest fresh ingredients. Whether you're a seasoned chef or a hungry adventurer, **Create: Cooking** adds a delectable dimension to your Minecraft experience.

**🥗Diverse Recipes:** Unleash your inner chef with an extensive list of recipes that cater to all tastes. Craft hearty stews, savory pies, refreshing smoothies, and more. The possibilities are endless, and each recipe brings its own buffs and benefits to aid you on your Minecraft journey.
  
**🛠️Create:** Using the mechanisms from the Create mod, you can create different food, for example, by pouring milk into a vessel and mixing it, you will get cheese.
  
**🌭Food:** The **Create: Cooking** mod adds many types of food such as: Fried Egg, Sausage, Toast with Honey and Chocolate, Cheese and Other



![all foods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/695e6ac2d5fe7b923dbd2a196a8ca3abd10dfa03.png)
